zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby於1186年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯皮爾斯比艾雷斯比時，他的父親Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby21歲，母親Hawise Multon22歲。他於1222年與Eva Grey在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1237年在他的家鄉享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Flemish and Dutch: variant of   Beek  .
Hungarian (also Béke): most probably from a Hungarian form of the Turkish status name beg (see Beg ). Alternatively, it may be a pet form of a Hungarian personal name such as Benedek .

variants.name: Beek
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Johannes, Kurt, Otto.

Dutch and North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a stream or creek, beek (compare Bek 6), or a habitational name from any of various Dutch places called Beek (in Limburg, Gelderland, and North Brabant), named with the same word.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby was born in 1186, in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby, was 21 and his mother, Hawise Multon, was 22. He married Eva Grey in 1222, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1237, in his hometown, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby est né en 1186, à Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Hawise Multon, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Eva Grey en 1222, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1237, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby 1186 in Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby 21 und seine Mutter Hawise Multon 22. Er hat 1222 in England Eva Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1237 im Alter von 51 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby è nato il nel 1186 nel Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Hawise Multon, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Eva Grey nel 1222, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1237, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Beke Lord of Eresbyが1186年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスパルスビーエレスビーで生まれた時，父Henry de Beke Lord of Eresbyは21歳，母Hawise Multonは22歳であった。1222年にイギリスでEva Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1237年に故郷で51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby(이)가 1186년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스피스비 레스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise Multon(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1222년 영국에서 Eva Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1237년 그의 고향에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby nasceu em 1186, em Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Hawise Multon, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby родился в 1186 г. в местности эресби, спилсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise Multon, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Eva Grey в 1222 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1237 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby nació en 1186, en Eresby, Spilsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry de Beke Lord of Eresby, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Hawise Multon, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Eva Grey en 1222, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1237, en su pueblo, a la edad de 51 años.
